name: Ravioli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz package frozen chopped spinach, thawed
1 16 oz package bow-tie pasta, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
In a large skillet over medium-high heat, brown ground beef, onion, and garlic.
Cook until onion becomes clear and soft, approximately 20 minutes. Drain excess fat. Transfer meat mixture to Crock-Pot. Add the tomatoes, tomato sauce, oregano, Italian seasoning, and salt and pepper, stirring to break up stewed tomatoes. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 8 hours or on High for 3 1/2 to 4 hours. In the last 30 minutes if cooking on Low, turn on High. Stir in the cooked pasta, spinach, and cheese. Serve immediately when melted.
